nasb.text: “Come forth from her midst, My people, And each of you save yourselves From the fierce anger of the Lord.

esv.text: “Go out of the midst of her, my people! Let every one save his life from the fierce anger of the Lord!

cnv.text: 我的子民哪！你們要從它那裡出來， 各自逃命， 躲避耶和華的烈怒。

ccb.text: “我的子民啊，你们要离开巴比伦， 各自逃命，躲避耶和华的烈怒。
